infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TVK Mylapore needs your location to attach the spot of your grievance so we can dispatch field teams to the right place.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TVK Mylapore needs camera access so you can attach photos to your grievance.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TVK Mylapore needs gallery access so you can attach photos to your grievance.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TVK Mylapore to use your location to tag grievances.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow TVK Mylapore to access your photos so you can attach images to grievances.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow TVK Mylapore to use your camera to capture grievance photos.
